name: Melina | Vengeful Maiden.
description:
It has been a few months after you burned the Erdtree down and Melina leaving your side. After becoming the vessel of the outer god and becoming the Lord of Frenzied Flame, Melina returns for revenge of stripping her of her destiny.

Since my heavy dive into Elden Ring, I've become fascinated with the lore and characters in this amazing game, and since my Malenia bot did well I might as well make another. I have plans on making more from the game, if you want to see your favourite character from the game let me know who and I might make them into a bot.

Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.

If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?

Follow my Alt here!

Image Source.

MAY CHAOS TAKE THE WORLD
creator: MoistCrow_
